sentence: 警方捣毁了一个涉及群交的违法场所。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng dǎohuǐ le yī gè shèjí qúnjiāo de wéifǎ chǎngsuǒ.
english: Police shut down an illegal venue involved in group sex.

sentence: 机器翻译越来越准确了。
pinyin: Jīqì fānyì yuèláiyuè zhǔnquè le.
english: Machine translation is getting more and more accurate.

meaning: entrap; to frame; plant false evidence against sb.
sentence: 他被同事诬陷偷了公司的钱。
pinyin: Tā bèi tóngshì wūxiàn tōu le gōngsī de qián.
english: He was framed by a colleague for stealing company money.

sentence: 台上的舞者动作非常优美。
pinyin: Tái shàng de wǔzhě dòngzuò fēicháng yōuměi.
english: The dancer on stage moved with great elegance.

sentence: 这片土地上的土著居民已经在这里住了几千年。
pinyin: Zhè piàn tǔdì shàng de tǔzhù jūmín yǐjīng zài zhèlǐ zhù le jǐ qiān nián.
english: The aboriginal people of this land have lived here for thousands of years.

sentence: 这家青年旅馆很受旅行者欢迎。
pinyin: Zhè jiā qīngnián lǚguǎn hěn shòu lǚxíngzhě huānyíng.
english: This youth hostel is very popular among travelers.

sentence: 短时间内学好一门语言不容易。
pinyin: Duǎn shíjiān nèi xuéhǎo yī mén yǔyán bù róngyì.
english: It's not easy to master a language in a short time.

sentence: 他对着星图找到了猎户座。
pinyin: Tā duìzhe xīngtú zhǎodào le Lièhù Zuò.
english: He used the star atlas to locate Orion.

meaning: 1. to dare (negative connotation); 2. to have the audacity to (do sth)
sentence: 你胆敢再迟到，我就不等你了。
pinyin: Nǐ dǎngǎn zài chídào, wǒ jiù bù děng nǐ le.
english: If you dare to be late again, I won't wait for you.

sentence: 这个桃子又甜又多汁。
pinyin: Zhège táozi yòu tián yòu duōzhī.
english: This peach is both sweet and juicy.

meaning: 1. color of the sky; 2. time of day, as indicated by the color of the
sentence: 天色越来越暗，我们得快点回家。
pinyin: Tiānsè yuèláiyuè àn, wǒmen děi kuài diǎn huíjiā.
english: It's getting darker and darker; we need to head home soon.

sentence: 借高利贷风险很大，要谨慎。
pinyin: Jiè gāolìdài fēngxiǎn hěn dà, yào jǐnshèn.
english: Taking out a high-interest loan is very risky; be cautious.

sentence: 孩子摔倒了，立刻大哭起来。
pinyin: Háizi shuāidǎo le, lìkè dàkū qǐlái.
english: The child fell down and immediately started crying loudly.

sentence: 老师在黑板上写了一个矩阵让我们计算。
pinyin: Lǎoshī zài hēibǎn shàng xiě le yī gè jǔzhèn ràng wǒmen jìsuàn.
english: The teacher wrote a matrix on the board for us to calculate.

sentence: 蜜蜂和花之间是一种共生关系。
pinyin: Mìfēng hé huā zhījiān shì yī zhǒng gòngshēng guānxi.
english: The relationship between bees and flowers is a form of symbiosis.

sentence: 她眼里带着笑意，心情很好。
pinyin: Tā yǎn lǐ dàizhe xiàoyì, xīnqíng hěn hǎo.
english: Her eyes carried a smiling expression; she was in a great mood.

sentence: 两国就防务合作进行了会谈。
pinyin: Liǎng guó jiù fángwù hézuò jìnxíng le huìtán.
english: The two countries held talks on defense cooperation.

meaning: 1. to redress (an injustice); 2. to rehabilitate (sb whose reputation
sentence: 法院最终为他平反，还了他清白。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn zuìzhōng wèi tā píngfǎn, huán le tā qīngbái.
english: The court finally rehabilitated him and restored his innocence.

sentence: 他们结婚前已经在计划买房了。
pinyin: Tāmen jiéhūn qián yǐjīng zài jìhuà mǎifáng le.
english: They were already planning to buy a house before getting married.

sentence: 周末我们去植物园转了一圈。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù zhíwùyuán zhuǎn le yī quān.
english: We took a stroll around the botanical garden over the weekend.

sentence: 手机读取二维码只需一秒。
pinyin: Shǒujī dúqǔ èrwéimǎ zhǐ xū yī miǎo.
english: It only takes a second for a phone to read a QR code.

meaning: 1. mechanic; 2. engineer; 3. machinist; 4. machine operator; 5. CL:個|个
sentence: 机械师花了两小时修好了电梯。
pinyin: Jīxièshī huāle liǎng xiǎoshí xiūhǎole diàntī.
english: The mechanic spent two hours repairing the elevator.

meaning: 1. to go on the rampage; 2. to riot; 3. to run amuck
sentence: 路上有几只螃蟹横行。
pinyin: Lù shàng yǒu jǐ zhī pángxiè héngxíng.
english: There were a few crabs scuttling sideways across the road.

sentence: 双方终于达成协议，签了合同。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng zhōngyú dáchéng xiéyì, qiānle hétong.
english: Both sides finally reached an agreement and signed the contract.

meaning: 1. to demote; 2. to relegate; 3. to degrade
sentence: 因为失误，他被降级处理。
pinyin: Yīnwèi shīwù, tā bèi jiàngjí chǔlǐ.
english: Due to his mistake, he was demoted.

sentence: 她买了一件蕾丝边的白裙子。
pinyin: Tā mǎile yī jiàn léisī biān de bái qúnzi.
english: She bought a white dress with a lace trim.

meaning: 1. to transfer (money to a bank account)
sentence: 我用手机转账给他五百块。
pinyin: Wǒ yòng shǒujī zhuǎnzhàng gěi tā wǔbǎi kuài.
english: I transferred five hundred yuan to him via my phone.

sentence: 学校举行了毕业盛典。
pinyin: Xuéxiào jǔxíngle bìyè shèngdiǎn.
english: The school held a grand graduation ceremony.

meaning: 1. to recover one's power or authority; 2. restoration (of a past
sentence: 历史课讲到了清朝复辟的故事。
pinyin: Lìshǐ kè jiǎng dàole Qīng cháo fùbì de gùshì.
english: The history class covered the story of the Qing dynasty restoration.

sentence: 会议室就在主楼三层。
pinyin: Huìyìshì jiù zài zhǔlóu sān céng.
english: The meeting room is on the third floor of the main building.

meaning: 1. to decorate; 2. to adorn; 3. to dress up; 4. to polish (a written p
sentence: 她花时间修饰了简历的措辞。
pinyin: Tā huā shíjiān xiūshìle jiǎnlì de cuòcí.
english: She took time to polish the wording of her resume.

sentence: 爷爷上周中风，现在住院治疗。
pinyin: Yéye shàng zhōu zhòngfēng, xiànzài zhùyuàn zhìliáo.
english: Grandpa had a stroke last week and is now hospitalized for treatment.

meaning: 1. presentation; 2. briefing; 3. (oral or written) brief report
sentence: 部门每周发一份工作简报。
pinyin: Bùmén měi zhōu fā yī fèn gōngzuò jiǎnbào.
english: The department sends out a work briefing every week.

meaning: 1. to look after; 2. to provide for
sentence: 她出差时请邻居照管猫咪。
pinyin: Tā chūchāi shí qǐng línjū zhàoguǎn māomī.
english: When she travels for work, she asks a neighbor to look after her cat.

sentence: 师傅用卷尺量度了窗户的宽度。
pinyin: Shīfu yòng juǎnchǐ liángdùle chuānghù de kuāndù.
english: The worker used a tape measure to measure the width of the window.

sentence: 她是商界公认的谈判高手。
pinyin: Tā shì shāngjiè gōngrèn de tánpàn gāoshǒu.
english: She is widely recognized in the business world as a top negotiator.

sentence: 城市的基建项目拉动了就业。
pinyin: Chéngshì de jījiàn xiàngmù lādòngle jiùyè.
english: The city's infrastructure projects boosted employment.

sentence: 请按次序排队，不要插队。
pinyin: Qǐng àn cìxù páiduì, bùyào chāduì.
english: Please queue in order and don't cut in line.

sentence: 人类有二十三对染色体。
pinyin: Rénlèi yǒu èrshísān duì rǎnsètǐ.
english: Humans have twenty-three pairs of chromosomes.

sentence: 物理课把小球简化成质点来计算。
pinyin: Wùlǐ kè bǎ xiǎoqiú jiǎnhuà chéng zhìdiǎn lái jìsuàn.
english: In physics class, the ball is simplified to a point mass for calculations.

meaning: 1. grass script; 2. cursive script (Chinese calligraphic style)
sentence: 他写的草书很流畅，难以辨认。
pinyin: Tā xiě de cǎoshū hěn liúchàng, nányǐ biànrèn.
english: His cursive script is very fluid but hard to read.

meaning: 1. dealer; 2. seller; 3. distributor; 4. broker; 5. agency; 6. franchi
sentence: 我找了当地经销商询问车价。
pinyin: Wǒ zhǎole dāngdì jīngxiāoshāng xúnwèn chē jià.
english: I went to the local dealer to ask about car prices.

sentence: 她随口念出一句唐朝诗句。
pinyin: Tā suíkǒu niàn chū yī jù Táng cháo shījù.
english: She casually recited a line of Tang dynasty verse.

sentence: 工厂把生产资料列出了清单。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng bǎ shēngchǎn zīliào lièchūle qīngdān.
english: The factory drew up a list of means of production.

meaning: bottom bracket shell (in a bicycle frame); (Buddhism) the five superna
sentence: 修自行车时，五通部件也要检查一下。
pinyin: Xiū zìxíngchē shí, wǔ tōng bùjiàn yě yào jiǎnchá yīxià.
english: When repairing a bike, you should also check the bottom bracket shell.

meaning: to write as substitute for sb; a ghost writer; plagiarism
sentence: 花钱找人代写论文是违规行为。
pinyin: Huā qián zhǎo rén dài xiě lùnwén shì wéiguī xíngwéi.
english: Paying someone to ghostwrite your thesis is a violation of the rules.

sentence: 他身上一个子儿都没带。
pinyin: Tā shēnshang yī gè zǐ ér dōu méi dài.
english: He didn't have a single penny on him.

meaning: labor and capital; workers and capitalists
sentence: 双方就劳资问题谈判了好几个小时。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng jiù láo zī wèntí tánpàn le hǎo jǐ gè xiǎoshí.
english: Both sides negotiated over labor-capital issues for several hours.

meaning: to be equipped with; to come with (sth)
sentence: 这款手机配有超大容量电池。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī pèi yǒu chāo dà róngliàng diànchí.
english: This smartphone comes with an extra-large battery.

meaning: to enter the capital; to go to Beijing
sentence: 他下周要进京开会，准备了很久。
pinyin: Tā xià zhōu yào jìn jīng kāihuì, zhǔnbèi le hěn jiǔ.
english: He's going to Beijing next week for a meeting and has been preparing for a long time.
